steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for ELECTRO ACO ALTONA S.A. indicators
from math import isclose
# Input values (latest = 2025-03-31)
shares = 22500.0
price = 14.55

# Balance sheet latest
ativo_total = 644494000.0
ativo_circ = 276196000.0
caixa = 10115000.0
aplic_fin = 68000.0
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin

estoques = 97157000.0
contas_receber = 120597000.0
tributos_rec = 44135000.0

passivo_circ = 216695000.0
fornecedores = 31135000.0
empr_fin_short = 73149000.0
outras_obrig = 37812000.0

passivo_nc = 90747000.0
empr_fin_long = 35581000.0

patrimonio = 337052000.0

# Income statements (quarter and annual)
# Quarterly Q1 2025
rev_q1_2025 = 152175000.0
cogs_q1_2025 = -110310000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 41865000.0
oper_q1_2025 = -625000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 41240000.0
fin_q1_2025 = 4012000.0
pre_tax_q1_2025 = 45252000.0
tax_q1_2025 = -3646000.0
net_q1_2025 = 41606000.0

# Quarterly Q1 2024
rev_q1_2024 = 128901000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 38242000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 20990000.0
net_q1_2024 = 13398000.0

# Annual 2024
rev_2024 = 564238000.0
ebit_2024 = 101077000.0
net_2024 = 66541000.0

dep_2024 = 23961000.0
# Depreciation Q1 values
dep_q1_2025 = 5760000.0
dep_q1_2024 = 5680000.0

# Receitas (other metrics)
receitas_q1_2025 = 179492000.0  # from section 7.01 (includes other revenues)
receitas_q1_2024 = 133842000.0
receitas_2024 = 597971000.0

# Compute LTM (12 months ending 2025-03-31): annual 2024 + Q1 2025 - Q1 2024
rev_ltm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ltm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ltm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024

# EBITDA LTM = EBIT LTM + Dep LTM
dep_ltm = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + dep_ltm

# Debt
div_bruta = empr_fin_short + empr_fin_long  # debentures none
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades

# Per-share metrics
vpa = patrimonio / shares
lpa = net_ltm / shares
ebit_per_share = ebit_ltm / shares
rev_ltm_per_share = rev_ltm / shares
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares
cap_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circ - disponibilidades
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares

# Market and EV
market_cap = price * shares
net_debt = div_liquida
ev = market_cap + net_debt

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else float('inf')
ppv = price / vpa
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share
psr = price / rev_ltm_per_share
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share!=0 else float('inf')

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('inf')

# Margins and returns (percent)
marg_bruta = ( ( ( ( (ebit_ltm + (rev_ltm - (ebit_ltm + dep_ltm) ))))) )
# The above is nonsense. We'll compute margins directly from gross, ebit, net using LTM gross.
# Need gross LTM: use Resultado Bruto annual and Q1 adjustments
resultado_bruto_2024 = 167359000.0
resultado_bruto_q1_2025 = 41865000.0
resultado_bruto_q1_2024 = 38242000.0
resultado_bruto_ltm = resultado_bruto_2024 + resultado_bruto_q1_2025 - resultado_bruto_q1_2024

marg_bruta_pct = resultado_bruto_ltm / rev_ltm * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else None
marg_ebit_pct = ebit_ltm / rev_ltm * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else None
marg_liq_pct = net_ltm / rev_ltm * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo_pct = ebit_ltm / ativo_total * 100 if ativo_total!=0 else None

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic_pct = ebit_ltm / roic_denom * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else None

roe_pct = net_ltm / patrimonio * 100 if patrimonio!=0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ if passivo_circ!=0 else None

# Div. Br / Patrim
div_br_patrim_pct = div_bruta / patrimonio * 100 if patrimonio!=0 else None

# Giro Ativos = Receita Líquida (12 meses) / Ativo Total
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total if ativo_total!=0 else None

# Prepare results
results = {
    'Ativo': ativo_total,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circ,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
    'Patrim. Líq': patrimonio,
    'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': rev_ltm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ltm,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': net_ltm,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rev_q1_2025,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2025,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': net_q1_2025,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': ppv,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta_pct,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit_pct,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liq_pct,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_ativo_pct,
    'ROIC': roic_pct,
    'ROE': roe_pct,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': div_br_patrim_pct,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print nicely
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

{"inp":{"code":"# Recompute without null bytes
from math import isclose
shares = 22500.0
price = 14.55

ativo_total = 644494000.0
ativo_circ = 276196000.0
caixa = 10115000.0
aplic_fin = 68000.0
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin

passivo_circ = 216695000.0
fornecedores = 31135000.0
empr_fin_short = 73149000.0
empr_fin_long = 35581000.0

patrimonio = 337052000.0

# Income
rev_q1_2025 = 152175000.0
rev_q1_2024 = 128901000.0
rev_2024 = 564238000.0

ebit_q1_2025 = 41240000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 20990000.0
ebit_2024 = 101077000.0

net_q1_2025 = 41606000.0
net_q1_2024 = 13398000.0
net_2024 = 66541000.0

# Depreciation
dep_2024 = 23961000.0
dep_q1_2025 = 5760000.0
dep_q1_2024 = 5680000.0

# Resultado bruto
res_bruto_2024 = 167359000.0
res_bruto_q1_2025 = 41865000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 38242000.0

# LTM calculations
rev_ltm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ltm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ltm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024

dep_ltm = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + dep_ltm

# Debt
div_bruta = empr_fin_short + empr_fin_long
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades

# Per share
vpa = patrimonio / shares
lpa = net_ltm / shares
ebit_per_share = ebit_ltm / shares
rev_ltm_per_share = rev_ltm / shares
ativos_per_share = ativo_total / shares
cap_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circ - disponibilidades
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares

market_cap = price * shares
net_debt = div_liquida
ev = market_cap + net_debt

pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
ppv = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share!=0 else None
psr = price / rev_ltm_per_share if rev_ltm_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativos = price / ativos_per_share if ativos_per_share!=0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share!=0 else None

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else None

resultado_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2024 + res_bruto_q1_2025 - res_bruto_q1_2024
marg_bruta_pct = resultado_bruto_ltm / rev_ltm * 100
marg_ebit_pct = ebit_ltm / rev_ltm * 100
marg_liq_pct = net_ltm / rev_ltm * 100

ebit_ativo_pct = ebit_ltm / ativo_total * 100
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic_pct = ebit_ltm / roic_denom * 100
roe_pct = net_ltm / patrimonio * 100
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ
div_br_patrim_pct = div_bruta / patrimonio * 100
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total

# Round outputs appropriately
def r(x,dec=2):
    if x is None: return None
    return round(x,dec)

out = {
 'Ativo': r(ativo_total,2),
 'Disponibilidades': r(disponibilidades,2),
 'Ativo Circulante': r(ativo_circ,2),
 'Dív. Bruta': r(div_bruta,2),
 'Dív. Líquida': r(div_liquida,2),
 'Patrim. Ldq': r(patrimonio,2),
 'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': r(rev_ltm,2),
 'EBIT (12 meses)': r(ebit_ltm,2),
 'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': r(net_ltm,2),
 'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': r(rev_q1_2025,2),
 'EBIT (3 meses)': r(ebit_q1_2025,2),
 'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': r(net_q1_2025,2),
 'P/L': r(pl,4),
 'P/VP': r(ppv,6),
 'P/EBIT': r(p_ebit,6),
 'PSR': r(psr,6),
 'P/Ativos': r(p_ativos,6),
 'P/Cap. Giro': r(p_cap_giro,6),
 'P/Ativ Circ Liq': r(p_ativ_circ_liq,6),
 'EV / EBITDA': r(ev_ebitda,6),
 'EV / EBIT': r(ev_ebit,6),
 'LPA': r(lpa,2),
 'VPA': r(vpa,2),
 'Marg. Bruta': r(marg_bruta_pct,2),
 'Marg. EBIT': r(marg_ebit_pct,2),
 'Marg. L�edquida': r(marg_liq_pct,2),
 'EBIT / Ativo': r(ebit_ativo_pct,2),
 'ROIC': r(roic_pct,2),
 'ROE': r(roe_pct,2),
 'Liquidez Corr': r(liquidez_corr,2),
 'Div Br/ Patrim': r(div_br_patrim_pct,2),
 'Giro Ativos': r(giro_ativos,6)
}

import json
print(json.dumps(out, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
